capture_method: Sanctioned web search via Claude Code agent proxy (2026-06-29). This environment's egress policy returns HTTP 403 on source hosts and throttles web.archive.org (429), so original-form bytes are not held. Canonical URL + verbatim text verified; promote with capture.sh --promote from an open-egress environment.
track: II(3)(c) foreseeability + partial CONTROL (the exclusion wall, applied)

notes: Kalshi fined/suspended (5-yr) Moran (VA, >$6,200, refused agreement), Klein (MN-02, >$530), Enriquez (TX-21, >$780) for betting their own races. Cuts both ways: partial CONTROL (the wall exists and fired) AND foreseeability (operators knew the outcome-channel harm was live).
